sections.paragraph:
fut. יִקְצֹף.-

(1) i.q. Arab. قصف to break (compare under קָצַב). Hence קֶצֶף No. 1, and קְצָפָה.

(2) to break out, or forth into anger (Gr. ῥήγνυμι), hence to be angry, indignant, Isa 57:16 64:8 followed by עַל of pers. Gen 40:2 41:10 Exo 16:20 followed by אֵל Jos 22:18.

Hiphil, to provoke (Jehovah) to anger, Deu 9:7, , 22 .

Hithpael, i.q. Kal No. 2, Isa 8:21.
